Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.geometry_building_type_recs" AS geometry_building_type_recs, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, max(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" * 1) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption__max" 
FROM resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS bs 
WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs."in.state" = 'CO' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/ee65d39603735c4485cb0445448f89eed41f2b99e5b15f780eed8da5be67dd75/314d3670-0928-424b-b46d-993189e1a986/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
